Who we are & What we do

Next Version provides a complete range of cloud consulting services to healthcare organizations. We design and implement multi-cloud solutions to meet the challenges hospitals and healthcare providers face today. We work with many types of healthcare entities, from large health systems to fast-growing startups. Our technical and operating team have expertise in healthcare IT roles at hospitals, healthcare organizations, and technology providers.


We speak your language.

Our Services
Cloud Migration

Migrate legacy applications and infrastructure to the cloud without disrupting operations or losing critical PHI in the process.

DevOps

Leverage DevOps to automate your CI/CD pipelines and deliver updates quickly for your mission-critical healthcare apps.

Application Modernization

Modernize your applications for the cloud by taking advantage of containers, serverless computing, microservices, and other cloud-native technologies.

System Integration(SI)

We can help you integrate anything and everything. Transform your APIs, 3rd party integrations, and microservices to overcome the challenges of system interoperability.

Data & Analytics

Migrate and configure scalable cloud native data lakes, pipelines, and analytical infrastructure capable of handling massive data volumes.

Managed Services

Reduce IT costs and improve productivity with 24/7 cloud support and monitoring, and managed DevOps operations.

Solutions

We build scalable, real-time, secure healthcare integrations on the cloud

Why Choose Next Version as your Cloud Solution Provider?

Next Version cloud solutions offer several benefits, making it an excellent choice for healthcare organizations.

Enhanced Security

We employ advanced security measures in our solutions to protect
sensitive patient data and ensure compliance with PIPEDA and HIPAA regulations.

Scalability

The cloud solutions we offer are designed to be flexible and scalable to meet the evolving needs of your healthcare organization, enabling you to expand or reduce capacity as needed.

Increased Efficiency

The solutions provided streamline operations, automate tasks, and minimize paperwork, enabling staff to concentrate on providing exceptional patient care.

Improved Patient Experience

Our solutions enable patients to conveniently access their medical records, schedule appointments, and receive telemedicine services, enhancing their overall healthcare experience.

Customizable Solutions

We can tailor our solutions to meet the specific requirements of your healthcare organization, ensuring they align with your business goals and objectives.

Expert Support

We offer expert support to ensure your healthcare organization receives the necessary guidance and assistance to optimize cloud performance and successfully achieve your goals.
